chapters.title: Late Night Notification
chapters.content: At midnight, Sofia received a message from someone she had not spoken to in years. It was simple: 'I was thinking about you today.'

chapters.title: Old Memories
chapters.content: She stared at the screen, remembering old conversations, unfinished plans, and the silence that had followed them for so long.

chapters.title: A Second Chance
chapters.content: After a long pause, Sofia replied. Sometimes life offers a second chance, but only if we are brave enough to answer.
